urdu transliteration text:
Aaja Asghar ki jaga, meri Sakina sojaCome in place of Asghar, sleep O my SakinaEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Aaja Asghar ki jaga, meri Sakina sojaJaagti maa nai kaha, meri Sakina soja
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
“Come in place of Asghar, sleep O my Sakina”,
said the mother of Sakina

Perhaps I may be able to relieve your fear,
Why do you sit far away, come, sleep o my Sakina,

urdu transliteration text:
Baap kai seenay pai aadat hain tujhay sonay kiMeri goudi teray qaabil ko nahi hain phir bhiAye mere dil ki sada meri Sakina soja
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You are used to sleeping on your father’s chest,
Perhaps my lap is not as comfortable,
But still my heart calls out, sleep O my Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Chaar barso se na zahmat di kabhi tune mujheApni khidmat ka mujhe aaj to mauka de deHoga ahsaan tera meri Sakina soja
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You have never asked me for anything these four years,
Please give me the chance to serve you today,
It will be an honour, sleep O my Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Qaidkhane me jo a jayenge tere babaKhud utha dungi mai shana hila kar teraAchha kuchh der zara meri Sakina soja
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
If your father comes to the prison,
I myself will shake your shoulder to wake you up,
Now for a little while at least, sleep O my Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Mujhse dekha nahi jaata ye tera dard-e-jigar Ye batate hue achha to nahi lagta magarAb na ayenge chachaa meri Sakina soja
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
It is difficult for me to see you in this agony,
It is hard for me to tell you that,
your uncle (Abbas) will not come back, sleep O my Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Sabiro ka ye karina to nahi hai bibiHai ye pardes Madina to nahi hai bibiKarke bas shukr-e-khuda meri Sakina soja
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O my Sakina please be patient,
This is a foreign land and not Madina,
Thank Allah (swt), and sleep O my Sakina

The orphan child slept in such a way that,
Her mother then never said, sleep o my Sakina
